raw.advertiser_name: 피망 쇼다운 홀덤 : 텍사스 홀덤, 포커, 토너먼트

hook.summary: High-energy introduction showing a massive live poker tournament and the game title.
hook.visual_action: Title card 'PMANG SHOWDOWN HOLD'EM' transitions to a wide shot of a crowded poker tournament hall.
hook.text_overlay: PMANG SHOWDOWN HOLD'EM 피망 쇼다운 홀덤 온라인 새틀라이트

scene_flow: Intro title card over a futuristic cityscape followed by a wide shot of a large-scale live poker tournament.
Close-up shots of a professional dealer handling cards and players at the tables.
Dynamic montage of poker gameplay, focusing on the cards and the competitive atmosphere.
Close-up of winning cards and poker chips with promotional text overlays.
Final branding screen with the game logo and mobile app store download badges.
audience_proxy: Competitive male poker enthusiasts in Korea interested in professional-style tournaments.
